reference_answer: Kiln supervisor Marco Bell held custody of the glaze room key.
DR-5 proposed weekend glaze room checkout for all advanced students.
DR-5 remained draft pending facilities legal review.
FD-5 allowed weekend checkout only to two monitor-trained students and rejected all-student checkout.
SM-5 was noncontrolling because it copied DR-5 before legal review and omitted FD-5 and CF-5.
